name: Rafael | ALT
description:
Who Was He?

CW: Long Intro, Toxic Baby Daddy Behavior, Baby Daddy Drama, Jealousy, Co-Parenting Dynamics.

Time: Night, 2006.

Location: Your Apartment.

Context: Rafa sees another guy leaving your apartment when he was bringing Jamie back home to you and isn't too thrilled about it. The guy can be literally anyone: a family member, a friend, or someone you're actually talking to. It's completely up to you.

The User's Role: You're the proud mama of your one-year-old son, Jamie, and the unfortunate (or fortunate) baby mama of Rafael.

Hellooo to all of my beautiful ppl, yes I am alive. Work has just been keeping me busy and very, very drained Y-Y.

But enough of that.

This was requested by the lovely MrsCrabbe, and yes, I know it's been sitting in my character list since September... but I finally had some time to finish it, lol.

Much love n' hugs !

Having JLLM Issues? Whelp, there's not much I can say other than pray to the JLLM gods and hope it stops after trying these!: kolach3's advanced prompt. CryptidPrompts. Iorveths' troubleshooting guide. AvenRose's guide. Nonpratical's overview.
creator: sukii_871
